free_text: -A study of protons emitted from aluminium,
iron and rhodium on bombardment with neutrons
Photo emulsion track detection, six nuclear
emulsions (Ilford C2,  4in. x 1 in. x 400 micron)
mounted in a hexagonal array around the target in a
integration and proton recoil counting in emulsions.

.Corrected for recoil protons from hydrogen in
emulsion, and for energy loss of protons produced
